search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Core hero hub with character list, hero equipment, and faction filters; useful for hero roster discovery and cross-checking hero-related pages.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster and related gear references

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table hub with badge costs and categories; useful for discovery of research names, tiers, and cost structure.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories and badge costs

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English home hub linking to heroes, research, alliance, buildings, and other guides; good entry point for topic discovery only.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search provider returned direct wiki results from lastz.fandom.com only. Results favor event and hero-system pages for discovery. Query also surfaced support pages for research speed and resources, but they were not as central to the user query, so they were omitted to keep the lead set focused.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycle includes Age of Science for research and Hero Initiative for hero upgrades, plus ranking and chest rewards.
results.primary_user_job: Find event tasks tied to research and hero growth
claims_to_verify: Exact daily cycle order by day

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page with hero classes, power factors, and hero types; useful for hero roster discovery.
results.primary_user_job: Identify hero system basics and roster structure
claims_to_verify: Any missing heroes or new balance changes

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom

search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to mmediamreza.com returned several Last Z-specific guide pages. Prioritized concrete gameplay/reference pages over generic or alliance/home pages. Did not include generic homepage results.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Dedicated guide for the Shooter Camp building, covering unlock requirements, training cap, speed, power, and upgrade table data.
results.primary_user_job: Find shooter troop training and upgrade details.
claims_to_verify: Training cap and speed by level

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for Assaulter Camp with training speed, cap, and power milestones for assault troop development.
results.primary_user_job: Find assaulter troop training and upgrade details.

results.evidence_summary: Guide for research progression, lab unlocks, and technology effects on production and combat growth.
results.primary_user_job: Find research and laboratory progression details.
